package.title: Grand Family — Cochin, Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam

highlights.text: Grand hills-to-beach circuit from Fort Kochi to Kovalam's golden crescent cliffs
Munnar tea valleys, Eravikulam Nilgiri Tahr sanctuary, and Mattupetty Dam
Thekkady spice plantations with VIP Kathakali and Kalaripayattu evening
Private Alleppey houseboat full-board cruise on Vembanad Lake
Kovalam Lighthouse Beach and Trivandrum royal heritage exploration
Private executive SUV with TRAGUIN 24/7 grand family concierge

itinerary.title: Grand Family — Cochin, Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam
itinerary.tagline: Grand Kerala Odyssey — Hills, Backwaters & Golden Beaches
itinerary.overview: Embark on TRAGUIN's grand exploratory odyssey across God's Own Country — colonial Fort Kochi, cloud-swept Munnar tea valleys, Periyar spice forests, Alleppey houseboats, and majestic Kovalam beach sunrises with handpicked premium stays throughout.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-002 | Grand Family Kerala | TRAGUIN Cochin Munnar Kovalam Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days grand Kerala family package (KL-002) covering Cochin, Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey houseboat, and Kovalam with premium stays and private transfers.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin — Heritages of Fort Kochi
days.description: Your grand Kerala family tour begins with an elegant VIP welcome at Cochin International Airport. After checking into your luxury urban hotel, explore the multi-cultural colonial tapestry of Fort Kochi — Chinese Fishing Nets, Jew Town, Paradesi Synagogue, Mattancherry Dutch Palace, and St. Francis Church.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chinese Fishing Nets, Jew Town, Paradesi Synagogue, Mattancherry Palace, Fort Kochi Heritage Pathways
Evening Experience: Pleasant sunset ferry ride or walking down vibrant café-lined walkways of old Fort Kochi
Overnight Stay: Cochin (Premium Oceanfront Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome Amenities & Grand Welcoming Dinner

days.title: Cochin to Munnar — Cloud-Kissed Tea Horizons
days.description: Indulge in a magnificent breakfast before driving east toward Munnar through winding mountain passes. Pause at Cheeyappara and Valara Waterfalls, pass Adimali spice markets, and arrive at your ultra-luxury hill resort as evening mist rolls across the valley.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara Waterfalls, Adimali Spice Markets, Neriamangalam Bridge
Evening Experience: Panoramic mountain gaps and mist settling over high-altitude valleys from your resort
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Luxury Tea Resort)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Fine-Dining Buffet Dinner

days.title: Munnar Hill Exploration — Velvet Greenery
days.description: TRAGUIN unlocks the finest natural treasures of Munnar — Mattupetty Dam with optional speed-boat, Echo Point, Kundala Arch Lake, Tata Tea Museum, and Eravikulam National Park for Nilgiri Tahr sightings.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Kundala Arch Lake, Tea Museum, Eravikulam National Park
Optional Activities: Private speed-boating, estate tea shopping, or optional elephant interaction program
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Luxury Tea Resort)
Meals Included: Resort Breakfast & Curated Theme Dinner

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady — Spice Sanctum & Periyar
days.description: After breakfast, travel south to Thekkady through cardamom hills. Join a private Spice Plantation Tour with a resident botanist, then enjoy VIP seating for Kalaripayattu and Kathakali cultural performances.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Periyar Forest Borders, Cardamom Estates, Local Handicraft Centers
Evening Experience: VIP seating for authentic Kathakali and Kalaripayattu cultural performances
Overnight Stay: Thekkady (Premium Wilderness Resort)
Meals Included: Full Breakfast & Authentic High-Range Dinner

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey — Floating Palaces
days.description: Depart the highlands for the emerald backwaters of Alleppey. Step aboard your exclusive ultra-luxury private houseboat at noon. Cruise Vembanad Lake past villages and paddy fields, watch the golden sunset, and anchor in a peaceful canal bay.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vembanad Lake, Alleppey Main Canals, Village Lagoons, Kuttanad Paddy Basins
Evening Experience: Relaxing on the open deck with fresh local snacks and hot tea as the sun dips below the horizon
Overnight Stay: Alleppey (Private Luxury Air-Conditioned Houseboat — Anchored)
Meals Included: Full Onboard Boarding — Breakfast, Lunch, High Tea & Dinner

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam — Crescent Cliffs
days.description: Wake to breakfast on deck as your houseboat returns to the jetty. Drive south along the coastal highway to Kovalam and check into your elite cliff-top resort overlooking the Arabian Sea. Relax on Lighthouse Beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lighthouse Beach, Hawah Beach, Coastal Highway Lookouts
Optional Activities: Climbing the Vizhinjam Lighthouse tower for sweeping coastal views
Overnight Stay: Kovalam (Premium Cliffside Beach Resort)
Meals Included: Fresh Houseboat Breakfast & Coastal Resort Dinner

days.title: Kovalam Beach & Trivandrum Heritage
days.description: Enjoy a beachside breakfast before visiting Trivandrum — Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple, Kuthira Malika Palace, and Napier Museum grounds. Return to Kovalam for Ayurvedic wellness or beach relaxation.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple (outer structures), Kuthira Malika Palace, Napier Museum grounds
Evening Experience: Private family celebration dinner arranged on the beach sands serenaded by crashing waves
Overnight Stay: Kovalam (Premium Cliffside Beach Resort)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Farewell Seafood Dinner

days.title: Kovalam to Trivandrum — Departure
days.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast overlooking the azure ocean. Complete check-out and your premium chauffeur transfers you to Trivandrum International Airport or Kochuveli Railway Station with cherished family memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Final ocean views from Kovalam cliff and optional Vizhinjam lighthouse glimpse en route
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance at Trivandrum Airport or Kochuveli Railway Station
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Grand Institutional Breakfast

hotels.name: Spice Village Private Pool Villa / Similar

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
07 nights premium accommodation across Cochin, Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey houseboat, and Kovalam
Complimentary candle-lit family dinner onboard private Alleppey houseboat
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
